items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The evidence provided does not sufficiently confirm or deny the requirement for the print-to-mail service integration.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the integration of print-to-mail services (Lob, Inkit) as specified in the use case. However, there is no direct evidence presented that confirms the existence or functionality of this integration. The prior step evidence does not address this specific requirement, leading to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of this need.
